title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind's Gemini audio stack provides one-API access to audio understanding with speaker labels, emotion detection, and language identification. It integrates speech generation via director's notes and Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a multimodal sound-to-sound real-time model with integrated reasoning. The stack includes Lyria 3 for full song generation with lyrics, callable via tool use from Gemini Live.
writeup: Thor Schaeff of Google DeepMind walks through Gemini's audio stack, a single API spanning audio understanding, speech generation, and music. The understanding side covers transcription with speaker labels, emotion detection, and language identification; generation includes "director's notes" for speech control and Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a sound-to-sound real-time model with integrated reasoning. Lyria 3 handles full song generation with lyrics and is callable as a tool from Gemini Live. The consolidation matters because it places transcription, conversational audio, and music creation behind one interface rather than separate models.
